title: Leaked images reveal Sony’s 10th anniversary ‘ColleXion’ headphones
summary: Leaked renders reveal Sony's 10th anniversary "ColleXion" headphones featuring thicker leatherette padding and larger earcups compared to the current WH-1000XM6 series, with an expected launch tomorrow. The design shows significant changes to Sony's flagship over-ear headphone model.
content:
The headband certainly looks more pillowy than any of Sony’s current headphone models. | Images by HotEUDeals / OnLeaks	

We now have a good idea of what Sony's upcoming 10th anniversary headphones will look like before their expected launch tomorrow. Leaked image renders of what appears to be Sony's 1000X "The ColleXion" Edition have been shared online by OnLeaks and HotEUDeals, showing thicker leatherette padding and "generously sized" earcups compared to Sony's current WH-1000XM6 series.
We knew to expect these headphones after the "ColleXion" name briefly appeared on Sony's websites in April with an over-ear headphone model number of "WH-1000XX," but that wasn't accompanied by any images at the time. Now, not only can we see the full headphone design and i …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 泄露的图像揭示索尼第十周年"ColleXion"耳机
zh.summary: 泄露的渲染图显示索尼第十周年"ColleXion"耳机采用了更厚的人造皮革垫和比当前WH-1000XM6系列更大的耳罩，预计将在明天推出。该设计对索尼旗舰级头戴式耳机进行了重大改动。

title: Bad, Bad, Bad, Bad Roommate
summary: After her breakup in January 2025, Venice resident Frankee Grove struggled to afford her $5,100 monthly rent and turned to Facebook to find a roommate. She connected with Sabrina Mollison, a fitness influencer whose affluent, Instagram-focused lifestyle sharply contrasted with Grove's bohemian background and values.
content:
The wildfires that would come to engulf Los Angeles had just begun to burn when Frankee Grove finally admitted to herself that she needed a roommate. It was January 2025, and Grove, then 42, had recently broken up with her boyfriend of six years. They had lived together in a two-bedroom Spanish bungalow on a quaint street in Venice. For Grove, this rental — with its vegetable garden and hardwood floors, arched doorways, and terra-cotta roof — had come to feel like a home. 
But she couldn’t afford the $5,100 monthly rent by herself. She needed to find a subletter, but her spare time was spoken for: She was volunteering to help those impacted by the wildfires currently ravaging the Pacific Palisades. Grove, a dedicated empath and striving progressive who has two decades of experience in education, always tried to see the good in others, and she wanted to embody those qualities herself. 
Still, she was bleeding cash. Grove eventually turned to Facebook, hoping to find someone who could move in quickly. She connected with a woman named Sabrina Mollison, whose online persona was classic SoCal: A fledgling fitness influencer, she posted Instagram reels of herself working out in expensive athleisure, posed for selfies in full-length mirrors, and affixed aspirational (but fairly banal) captions under day-in-the-life content (“Trust the process” and “You can’t make progress if you don’t start”). 


Grove, who grew up in Massachusetts to teacher parents and had a decidedly more bohemian vibe — she launched a botanical side hustle, sported a surfer-girl haircut, and summered on Cape Cod — believed that their incompatibility might be a good thing. They didn’t need to be friends. Lately, her life was defined by instability. Grove welcomed a simple, transactional relationship. 
Mollison arrived for a tour wearing a workout uniform and a thick layer of makeup. Grove showed her the house. Mollison appeared underwhelmed, her affect flat, but said she would rent the room for Grove’s

zh.title: 坏，坏，坏，坏室友
zh.summary: 在2025年1月分手后，威尼斯居民弗兰基·格罗夫很难承担她5100美元的月租，转向Facebook寻找室友。她与健身网红萨布里娜·莫利森建立了联系，后者富有且专注于Instagram的生活方式与格罗夫的波希米亚背景和价值观形成了鲜明对比。

title: The US space enterprise is desperately waiting for Starship—will it finally deliver?
summary: The US space industry faces critical dependence on SpaceX's Starship program, which is expected to play a pivotal role in upcoming space missions. Success or failure of this venture will significantly impact the trajectory of American spaceflight capabilities.
content: "This is such a wild ride. The highs are high. The lows are low."

zh.title: 美国太空产业正在迫切等待星舰——它最终会交付吗?
zh.summary: 美国太空产业面临对SpaceX星舰项目的关键依赖，该项目预计将在即将到来的太空任务中发挥关键作用。这项事业的成功或失败将显著影响美国航天能力的发展轨迹。

title: South Korea’s LetinAR is building optics behind AI glasses
summary: South Korean startup LetinAR has developed thumbnail-sized optical lenses that could become the technological foundation for next-generation AI glasses. The company's innovation addresses a critical component needed to make augmented reality glasses practical and scalable.
content: A lens the size of a thumbnail — and the South Korean startup that makes it could become the optical backbone of the AI glasses era.

zh.title: 韩国LetinAR正在开发AI眼镜背后的光学技术
zh.summary: 韩国初创公司LetinAR开发了缩略图大小的光学镜片，可能成为下一代AI眼镜的技术基础。该公司的创新解决了使增强现实眼镜实用和可扩展所需的关键部件。

title: Disco Elysium’s spiritual successor can’t escape its phantoms
summary: "Zero Parades: For Dead Spies," a spiritual successor to the critically acclaimed 2019 RPG Disco Elysium, follows protagonist Cascade as she seeks redemption after a failed spy operation. The game explores themes of forgiveness and second chances after Cascade's five-year forced absence from active duty.
content:
Zero Parades: For Dead Spies wants you to question the price of forgiveness. After leading a crew of spies through a failed operation, protagonist Cascade is willing to pay whatever amount is needed to reestablish contact not just with fellow agents, but with the friends she let down. After being "frozen" for five years and forced to do desk work, Cascade is sent to the city of Portofiro with an assignment and a chance to redeem herself.
Zero Parades highly resembles Disco Elysium, the critically acclaimed 2019 RPG featuring a disastrous detective dealing with generational heartbreak and a hangover that split his psyche into dozens of voice …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 《迪斯科涅槃》的精神续作逃不出其幽灵
zh.summary: 《零游行：致死去的间谍》是备受好评的2019年RPG游戏《迪斯科涅槃》的精神续作，跟随主角凯斯凯德在失败的间谍行动后寻求救赎。该游戏探索了凯斯凯德强制离职五年后的原谅和第二次机会的主题。
